summary: Fixed sioyek default PDF viewer in GNOME Files by using xdg.dataFile to create a custom desktop entry in ~/.local/share/applications/ (the location GNOME respects) and configuring xdg.mimeApps for declarative MIME associations.

artifacts.summary: Added xdg.enable, xdg.dataFile for sioyek.desktop, and xdg.mimeApps configuration
Implementation summary documenting xdg.dataFile approach and verification results

completion_data.completion_summary: Created declarative sioyek PDF viewer configuration in Home Manager using xdg.dataFile to place the desktop entry in ~/.local/share/applications/ (which GNOME respects) with xdg.mimeApps for MIME associations.

next_steps: Test by double-clicking a PDF in GNOME Files. If GNOME caches the old association, log out and log back in to refresh.
